title: The week in charts: India’s GDP growth cut, rising fuel costs, parenting concerns
content:
India's GDP growth has been revised downwards.
*   Fuel costs are increasing.
*   Concerns related to parenting are highlighted.

title: Demand driving growth, but economic outlook ‘somewhat clouded’ by supply issues: RBI
content:
Strong demand is currently driving economic growth.
*   However, the overall economic outlook is somewhat uncertain or "clouded."
*   This uncertainty, as noted by the RBI, is primarily due to ongoing supply issues.

title: RBI injects ₹81,590 crore transient liquidity into banking system via 3-day VRR auction
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) injected ₹81,590 crore into the banking system.
*   This infusion provided transient (temporary) liquidity to banks.
*   The transaction was facilitated via a 3-day Variable Rate Reverse Repo (VRR) auction.

title: RBI board approves dividend payment of ₹2,86,588 crore to government
content:
The RBI board has approved a dividend payment.
*   This payment is directed to the government.
*   The total amount approved for the dividend is ₹2,86,588 crore.

title: YouTube star Danny Go mourns heartbreaking loss of 14-year-old son Isaac
content:
YouTube star Danny Go is mourning the death of his son.
*   His son, Isaac, was 14 years old.
*   The loss is described as heartbreaking.

title: India successfully test-fires Agni-1 ballistic missile from Odisha
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   India successfully test-fired a missile.
*   The missile involved was the Agni-1 ballistic missile.
*   The launch was carried out from Odisha.

title: Supreme Court refers UAPA bail curbs to larger Bench for ‘authoritative’ ruling
content:
Here's the summary of the headline in 3 bullet points:

*   The Supreme Court has referred the issue of bail restrictions under the Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act (UAPA).
*   This matter has been sent to a larger Bench of judges.
*   The referral aims to secure an "authoritative" and definitive ruling on the stringent UAPA bail provisions.

title: Punjab government to remove stray dogs from high footfall public spaces following Supreme Court order
content:
The Punjab government will begin removing stray dogs.
*   The focus for removal is high footfall public spaces.
*   This action is being undertaken in compliance with a Supreme Court order.
